heading: Placement
label: 2105 Placement
text: The Law Revision Counsel is directed to place this Act as chapter 20 of title 48.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Puerto Rico Oversight, Management, and Economic Stability Act and also as PROMESA, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 114–187130 Stat. 549section 2101 of this titleJune 30, 2016
